title: Senior Teacher - NASSCOM Foundation - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NASSCOM Foundation - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation family as a Senior Teacher in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
